title: Floral Ukrainian Borscht Ramen
description: A unique fusion of Japanese and Ukrainian flavors in a delicious ramen bowl.
instructions: Cook the ramen noodles according to the package instructions.
In a pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the soy sauce and stir to combine.
Add the borscht and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let cook for 5 minutes.
Add the green onions, pickled ginger, and sliced scallions to the pan.
Stir to combine and let cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the borscht mixture over the cooked ramen noodles.
Garnish with additional green onions and sliced scallions if desired.
